ocr_text: SAYS EASE IN MONEY IS CLOSE AT HAND; Ex-Controller of the Currency Roberts Declares the Worst Is Over. NO REASON FOR A PANIC The Effect of the Enormous Wealth of the West Will Soon Be Felt -- Copper Authority Also Optimistic.
THE EFFECT IN LONDON.; Drop in Americans Follows News of the Financial Situation Here. CLEWS SAYS IT'S ALL OVER.

SECOND DAY'S RUN SUCCESSFULLY MET; Trust Company of America Pays Out $9,000,000 More and Gets Some Deposits. EXCITEMENT NOT SO HIGH All Demands Will Be Met To-day, Say Company's Officials -- Some Anxious Depositors in Line All Night. Depositors Calming Down. Selling Places in Line. Only One Line of Depositors. Some Large Deposits Received. Colonial Trust Company's Run. LINCOLN TRUST PAYS ALL. Will Meet Every Demand as Usual Today, Says President Tilford. BANKS ALL RIGHT -- APPLETON. A $250,000,000 Reserve Behind All in the Clearing House.

TOPICS IN WALL STREET.; Believe the Worst Is Over. Call Money Still a Luxury. Factors in Bank Statement. Advance in Copper Metal. Stocks and the Bank Trouble. Where Is the Money Going? IMPORTS OF DRY GOODS.
PARIS BANKERS CONFIDENT.; Look for Quick Recovery Here -- Send Buying Orders.
CONFIDENCE IN PHILADELPHIA.; Nothing to Fear Here, Say the Quaker City Bankers -- Situation Clear Now.
GOLD HUNTERS BUSY IN LONDON MARKET; Heavy Purchases and Engagements for Shipment to New York Banks. A LOT FROM BUENOS AYRES Bank of England Expected to Raise Its Rate in Order to Protect Its Reserve.
TOPICS IN WALL STREET.; Market Better Than Expected. Banker's Hopeful View. Hour of Publishing Bank Figures. Eager for a Holiday. Not Many Savings Bank Bonds Offered.

AMERICANS RETURN IN OPTIMISTIC MOOD; Financial Crisis Over, Say Gould, Gates, and Others, Back from Europe. LINER MAKES FAST TRIP The Kronprinzessin Cecilie Lowers Her Record from Cherbourg Despite Three Days of Rough Weather.
TOPICS IN WALL STREET.; New Pennsylvania Gossip. Call Money Advances Again. Sugar Under Pressure. Cotton Crop Report. A Bond Man's View.
DAILEY AND ROSS AT HOME.; Weber Chorus Helps to Launch Them on a Housekeeping Career.
